_comment: Regression floors for the real-pipeline RAG Golden Test. The cases seed a controlled corpus and run the real retriever, generator and verifier. Retrieval floors are strict; lexical generation floors remain coarse because paraphrases score poorly under term-overlap proxies. claim_accuracy is currently reported but not gated, which is a known quality-gap exposed by the 2026-06-23 run. The test runs whenever LLM/Postgres are configured and skips only when the required real environment is unavailable.
